issue_title: fix card border radius when it's the only child
issue_body_preview:
## Description

### Context
When there's only one card, the css rule `body .layout-vertical .column div:last-child .card` (line 266 of `src/assets/app.scss`) kicks in as it is indeed the "last-child" in this scenario. However, the css property `border-radius: 0 0 5px 5px;` caused the `top-left` a
test_description_zh: 在垂直布局模式下，配置一个分组中仅包含一张卡片（即该卡片既是第一个也是最后一个子元素），观察该卡片的四个圆角是否正确显示。
expected_result_zh: 当分组中只有一张卡片时，卡片的四个角（左上、右上、左下、右下）都应正确显示圆角（border-radius），不应出现某些角缺失圆角变为直角的情况。
